description: You are a business development director creating an interactive Power BI dashboard with app-like navigation using buttons and bookmarks. Using the data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv, create a report with three pages named "Home", "Regional Revenue", and "Category Breakdown". The "Home" page must feature navigation buttons labeled "Go to Regional Revenue" and "Go to Category Breakdown", while the analysis pages must each include a "Back to Home" button. On the "Regional Revenue" page, include a Clustered Column Chart showing Sales_Amount by Region and a bookmark named "Revenue View" capturing the page state. On the "Category Breakdown" page, include a Pie or Donut Chart showing Sales_Amount by Product_Category and a bookmark named "Category View" capturing the page state. Save the final report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Navigation_Report.pbix.
